method: First frame + last frame per scene, Seedance fills the motion
audio_rule: NO TALKING. Ambient sound only — wind, footsteps, crowd noise, clinking, laughter. No dialogue, no voiceover, no lip-sync.

background.description: Any of the 18 personas can be used as background characters

assets._instructions: One reference image per prop. These are for coherence, not perfection. The video model isn't stupid — it just needs to know what the prop looks like. Don't over-generate.

rules.1: NEVER batch-generate. One frame at a time, sequential, wait for approval.
rules.2: NEVER skip the image step. Image first, then video. Two separate steps.
rules.3: NEVER generate without previous scene as reference for continuity.
rules.4: Image prompts = frozen moments. No motion verbs. No video action.
rules.5: Upload to GitHub IMMEDIATELY after generation. User reviews on GitHub Pages, not in chat.
rules.6: One image per generation unless user specifically asks for multiple candidates.
rules.7: Document every prompt and every approval in this file.
rules.8: Props need one reference image each. Don't over-generate angles.
